model: v24deploy_wc5 (3-seed, retrained 2026-07-09 on all 96 WC2026 results through the Round of 16) — 0.5*transformer + 0.5*confed-adjusted draw-aware Elo (neutral, confirmed-XI)

lineups.morocco: 4-2-3-1: Bounou; Hakimi, Diop, Mazraoui, Salah-Eddine; El Aynaoui, Bouaddi; Talbi, Ounahi, El Khannouss; Brahim Diaz
lineups.france: 4-2-3-1: Maignan; Kounde, Upamecano, Saliba, Digne; Kone, Rabiot; Dembele, Olise, Doue; Mbappe

staking_method: half-Kelly capped at 8% of settled bankroll (standing rule since 2026-07-07, see bankroll.md): full-Kelly fraction 0.235, half-Kelly 0.117 exceeds the 0.08 cap, so 0.08 x EUR122.04 = EUR9.76, rounded up to EUR10.00
note: Only +EV leg: Morocco win EV -12.7%, Draw EV -35.8%, both excluded. Book overround 2.10%.
